source_jobs.title: Product Designer - Agent+
source_jobs.description:
JOB OVERVIEW

As a Product Designer at Tempo Labs, you will be instrumental in shaping our product. You will work closely with a cross-functional team to design user-centric solutions that meet the evolving needs of designers and developers.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Lead the design of user interfaces and user experiences for our AI-powered visual IDE.

 - Collaborate with founders, clients, and engineers to understand requirements and transform ideas into elegant design solutions.

 - Conduct user research and usability testing to gather insights and validate design decisions.

 - Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs using modern design tools.

 - Advocate for design best practices, ensuring a consistent and intuitive user experience across our platform.

 - Stay updated with the latest design trends, techniques, and technologies in the industry.
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Proven experience in product design, particularly in tech or startup environments.

 - Strong portfolio showcasing UI/UX design skills, with an emphasis on designing complex software applications.

 - Proficiency in Sketch, Figma, Adobe XD, or similar.

 - Excellent understanding of user-centered design principles and methodologies.

 - Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to articulate design decisions and iterate based on feedback.

 - Familiarity with front-end development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) is a plus.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - The opportunity to be part of an innovative, fast-growing startup.

 - A collaborative, flexible, and supportive work environment.

source_jobs.title: Frontend Engineer (React Native)
source_jobs.description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We’re specifically looking for someone with strong React Native experience, as mobile is a central focus of our roadmap. Familiarity with React for web is also important, as our platform spans both environments. You’ll collaborate with a cross-functional team of engineers, designers, and product leads to deliver seamless, high-performance applications that power modern product teams.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Support Agent+ customers by building custom components, features, and workflows tailored to their product needs.

 - Design and implement robust front-end solutions using our visual IDE, optimizing for performance and scalability.

 - Work closely with UX/UI designers to translate design concepts into functional code.

 - Contribute to the development lifecycle, including coding, testing, debugging, and deployment.

 - Ensure high-quality graphic standards and brand consistency.

 - Stay updated with emerging front-end technologies and methodologies, integrating them to enhance our platform's capabilities.

 - Maintain an online presence between the hours of 9am - 4pm EST
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

 - Proven experience as a Front-End Developer or similar role, preferably in tech or startup environments.

 - Expertise in front-end technologies, including JavaScript, CSS, HTML, and frameworks like React.js, and tailwind.

 - Experience with responsive and adaptive design principles.

 - Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

 - Excellent communication and teamwork skills, with a knack for bridging the gap between technical and non-technical teams.
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - The opportunity to be part of an innovative, fast-growing startup.

 - A collaborative, flexible, and supportive work environment where your contributions directly impact the product's success.

source_jobs.title: Product Delivery Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT TEMPO

At Tempo, we are transforming the way businesses leverage AI to build software. Our flagship service, Agent+, pairs AI agents with senior designers and developers to deliver full stack product development at 10x speed. We handle everything from consumer apps to custom AI agent builds for clients across industries.

As we scale rapidly and onboard new clients, we're seeking a Product Delivery Manager who can operate at the intersection of people, process, and AI to keep delivery tight across a high-volume book of business.

Your Role (On-site)

You'll own end-to-end delivery for 20+ concurrent Agent+ client projects, managing a shared pool of designers and developers. This isn't a traditional PM role. You'll use AI tools daily to manage context across clients, generate documentation, surface risks, and move faster than would be possible manually. You are the bridge between clients and our team, responsible for shipping work on time, on spec, and at a quality level that keeps clients retained.

Key Responsibilities

 - Manage delivery across approximately 20 concurrent accounts, maintaining a 5 to 10 feature per week cadence per client

 - Own capacity planning and resource allocation across a shared team of designers and developers. Real resource math, not just task lists

 - Build trust through specific, proactive client communication that demonstrates command of their product and priorities

 - Use AI tools (Claude, Fireflies, internal Tempo tooling) as core parts of your workflow to manage context, draft documentation, synthesize meetings, and flag risks at scale

 - Coordinate cross-functional teams, manage handoffs, and keep stakeholders aligned at every stage

 - Oversee QA and feedback loops to ensure quality standards before release

 - Identify where AI can replace manual process and propose those improvements


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Degree in business or related field. Minor or dual degree in engineering/computer science or related field preferred

 - New grad or up to 2 years of experience in product delivery, project management, or client-facing product roles

 - Ability to manage multiple workstreams and clients simultaneously

 - Strong organizational skills and capacity planning mindset

 - People management instincts for navigating difficult conversations with clients and team members

 - Active user of AI tools in your daily workflow. We will ask you how

 - Exceptional communication skills

 - Understanding of the software development lifecycle


BONUS

 - Startup or high-growth experience

 - Background in UX/UI or product development (React, React Native)

 - Experience with AI agent development or AI-powered products

Why Join Us?

You'll shape how a growing team operates, build systems that scale, and see the direct impact of your work on clients and revenue every day. If you think in systems and believe AI should be embedded in how you work, we want to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: QA Specialist – Agent+ (Remote)
source_jobs.description:
About Agent+ at Tempo Labs

Tempo Labs is revolutionizing the way designers and developers collaborate. Through Agent+ we’re helping high growth start-ups boost their speed of design & development using a combination of AI + human expertise.

The Role
As a Web Application Tester (QA Specialist) at Agent+, you’ll ensure the quality and reliability of web applications for multiple clients are meeting acceptance criteria. You will work closely with our Agent+ team and PMs to thoroughly test web applications, identify bugs, and provide detailed feedback to the development team. Developers will be pushing 1-3 PRs per week that are required to be tested prior to being pushed. 

Compensation: 800 USD / month

Key Responsibilities

 - Conduct QA testing on features prior to release to identify and document bugs, usability issues, and inconsistencies with designs.

 - Collaborate with developers and product managers to understand application requirements and ensure that all features are rigorously tested.

 - Create detailed test plans, cases, and reports to track issues and communicate progress effectively for each client product.

 - Perform manual testing of web applications built with React.

 - Validate bug fixes and new features during weekly development cycles.

 - Bonus: Offer solutions for automated testing

What We’re Looking For

 - Understanding of web application workflows and common testing tools.

 - Strong English written and verbal communication skills to document bugs and collaborate with global teams.

 - A proactive approach to identifying, analyzing, and resolving issues.

 - Self-motivated and organized, capable of managing tasks remotely.

 - Understanding of Github and control systems.

Preferred Qualifications

 - Knowledge of debugging tools and methodologies.

 - English level B2 or better (or an equivalent) 

 - Bonus: Experience with automated testing tools like Selenium, Cypress, or similar.

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Designer - Agent+
source_jobs.description:
JOB OVERVIEW

At Tempo, we’re not just designing products—we’re defining the future of design engineering. Our flagship platform, Agent+, empowers the next generation of designers and developers to ship production-grade applications 10x faster. To meet the demands of our most advanced customers, we’re searching for a Senior Product Designer who thrives at the intersection of design, engineering, and influence.



This role is uniquely compensated 50% above standard product design roles because we are seeking leaders: someone who brings not just skill, but authority, voice, and visibility in the design community. You’ll serve as the face of design excellence within Tempo, helping us shape client success while becoming a recognized leader in the global UI/UX and design engineering movement.







WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Lead with Influence: Own the design vision for Agent+ engagements with high-profile clients who demand exceptional UI/UX.

 - Push Boundaries: Pioneer workflows that merge design and code, creating user-centric solutions that redefine industry standards.

 - Be a Voice: Advocate for design engineering internally and externally; candidates with strong social media presence and thought leadership will be prioritized.

 - Collaborate Deeply: Partner with founders, clients, and engineers to translate complex requirements into seamless design systems.

 - Shape the Experience: Conduct research, prototype, and test iteratively to ensure elegant, intuitive outcomes.

 - Elevate Design Culture: Champion best practices, lead internal workshops, and mentor peers on design craft and product thinking.







WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - Experience: 5+ years in product design with direct impact at venture-backed startups.

 - Portfolio: Evidence of world-class design execution on complex software applications.

 - Design Engineer Mindset: Not just a designer—someone who thrives at the cross-section of UI, UX, and code.

 - Tools Mastery: Proficiency in Figma, but willingness to transfer those skills into the Tempo Environment.

 - Communication: Clear, bold, and able to articulate decisions to both executives and engineers. English C1 or better is required.

 - Influence: Active in the design community with a notable social following or public-facing presence (conference speaking, blogging, content creation).

 - Bonus: Familiarity with front-end technologies (React, CSS, JavaScript) or design-to-code workflows.





WHY JOIN US

 - Elevated Compensation: Top-of-market pay (50% higher than typical senior design roles).

 - Industry Leadership: Become a pioneer in the design engineering space with a platform that’s reshaping how products are built.

 - Visibility: An opportunity to become the outward-facing design leader for a YC-backed startup.

 - Impact: Direct influence on customer-facing experiences at a company scaling globally.

 - Culture: Work in a collaborative, fast-moving, and innovation-driven environment.

source_jobs.title: Video Editor / Motion Designer
source_jobs.description:
Tempo is looking for a Video Editor / Motion Designer to help us turn AI product development into short-form videos people actually want to watch.

You do not need to be senior. You do need taste, speed, curiosity, and a strong desire to get better fast.

You will work on product demos, social clips, launch videos, founder-led content, brand stories, and motion assets. The goal is simple: take raw material and turn it into videos that feel sharp, premium, and worth watching.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own videos from idea to final cut

 - Turn raw footage, screen recordings, streams, and interviews into short-form content

 - Create edits for social, launches, product moments, and ads

 - Move fast from rough cut to feedback to final delivery

 - Add motion, polish, pacing, music, captions, and structure

 - Keep every video on-brand and high-quality


WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - A strong eye for pacing, rhythm, story, and visual taste

 - Comfortable with After Effects, Premiere, Photoshop, or similar tools

 - Access to a Mac, to edit Screen Studio videos (which our team records with)

 - Fast with new tools, especially AI, motion, and design tools

 - Interested in startups, AI, software, and the tools people use to build products

 - Strong communication skills

 - High ownership. You do not wait around or need constant hand-holding

 - Comfortable in a fast-moving, high-intensity environment

 - Fluent English, written and spoken

You do not need to be deeply technical, but you should find this world genuinely interesting.



TO APPLY

Send us two short videos:

 1. A 30–60 second video of yourself talking to camera. Phone is fine. Tell us why you want to work at Tempo and why you think you are a fit.

 2. Your best video or motion design work. Pick the piece that best shows what you can really do, preferably in English.

Both are required for us to consider your application.

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineer (Remote)
source_jobs.description:
JOB OVERVIEW

As a full-stack engineer at Tempo, you will play a pivotal role. Your focus will be on developing intuitive, high-performance web applications within our AI-powered visual IDE. You'll collaborate with a cross-functional team, contributing your technical expertise to create seamless experiences for designers and developers.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design and implement robust front-end solutions for our visual IDE, optimizing for performance and scalability.

 - Work closely with UX/UI designers to translate design concepts into functional code.

 - Contribute to the development lifecycle, including coding, testing, debugging, and deployment.

 - Build and maintain backend capabilities in TypeScript, including Supabase (database, auth, storage) and Supabase Edge Functions for serverless logic and integrations.

 - Create, version, and document APIs (REST and/or RPC) with clear specifications using OpenAPI/Swagger, ensuring strong developer experience and maintainability.

 - Contribute to the full development lifecycle, including coding, testing, debugging, and deployment across both frontend and backend.

 - Ensure high-quality graphic standards and brand consistency.

 - Stay updated with emerging front-end technologies and methodologies, integrating them to enhance our platform's capabilities.

 - Maintain an online presence between the hours of 9am - 4pm EST
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field — or equivalent practical experience.

 - 2+ years experience as a full-stack developer (startup/product experience preferred).

 - Strong proficiency in TypeScript and modern React development (HTML/CSS/JS fundamentals).

 - Experience with Tailwind CSS and building responsive, adaptive interfaces.

 - Working experience with Sadupabase (Postgres/Auth/Storage) and Supabase Edge Functions.

 - Experience building and documenting APIs, including using OpenAPI/Swagger (or similar).

 - Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and comfort shipping production code.

 - Clear communicator and collaborative teammate who works well with designers, PMs, and engineers.

 - Fluent in English (written and spoken).






WHAT WE OFFER

 - The opportunity to be part of an innovative, fast-growing startup.

 - A collaborative, flexible, and supportive work environment where your contributions directly impact the product's success.

 - Starting salary of $40,000 USD with the opportunity to increase to $60,000 USD
